"visible", "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [0, 0, 1440, 1405], "focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": false, "children": [{"text": "Version - Haunter 

Dexter has been overhauled from the ground up. Everything has been redone to improve the overall experience. We're very happy with the results, and we hope you are too.

With this many changes, there will be bugs, but we're going to be cracking down on those. Thanks for your support.

-Most main screens have had their UI redesigned to give more information at a glance.

-Pokedex's search feature has been revamped to suggest a lot of options. Give it a try!

-Caughtdex has been redesigned to make it more of a checklist to make it's intent clear.

-Teamdex has been redesigned to allow more creation of teams.
